data.title: Voiset AI Planner's Smart Booking reduces calendar chaos for professionals with native AI scheduling, trusted by 4,000+ teams.
data.description: Using native AI scheduling can prevent double-bookings by cross-referencing actual availability in various workspaces. Essentially, one efficient link streamlines coordination efforts for busy individuals. In an announcement made on Jan. 28, 2026, Voiset, the primary AI voice task organizer relied upon by over 4,000 teams, unveiled this groundbreaking feature.

data.title: Sedgwick introduces Tow and Storage Negotiation Service in its Auto Solutions, aiming to decrease claims costs.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee on January 28, 2026, Sedgwick, a prominent risk and claims administration company, announced the introduction of its latest offering, the Tow and Storage Negotiation Service, as part of its range of Auto Solutions services. This new service aims to decrease total claims handling expenses by reducing...

data.title: Daytona Beach gears up for 85th annual Bike Week on Feb. 27-March 8, one of the world's largest motorcycle gatherings.
data.description: In Daytona Beach, Florida, the 85th annual Bike Week will take place from February 27 to March 8, 2026, marking the start of the riding season for motorcycle enthusiasts. This event is among the largest motorcycle gatherings globally and is organized by the Daytona Beach Regional Chamber of Commerce.

data.title: Grant awarded by Unlikely Collaborators to Foundation for Energy Therapies, supporting Integrative Mental Health University.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 28, 2026, Unlikely Collaborators announced a grant awarded to Foundation for Energy Therapies, Inc. to support their Integrative Mental Health University (IMHU). The grant aims to foster a unique approach that combines scientific research and spiritual teachings. IMHU is dedicated to shaping the future of mental health through this innovative integration.

data.title: Inventor from Oxford, Conn. develops durable snow shovel BKC-712, aiming for more durability compared to standard ones.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor from Oxford, Connecticut shared his inspiration for creating a new and improved snow shovel. The inventor expressed a desire to address the need for durability in snow shovels, leading to the creation of THE ULTIMATE SNOW SHOVEL. This innovative design offers a sturdier option compared to traditional plastic scoops that often wear out quickly. The product aims to provide a more reliable solution for clearing snow, catering to individuals seeking a more durable and efficient snow removal tool.

data.title: Littera Education introduces new data collection product to improve analysis of tutoring programs. (Characters: 91)
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Littera Education, a prominent provider of effective tutoring services and technology solutions, revealed its latest product aimed at tackling the common issue of acquiring reliable and comparable data for evaluating the efficacy of tutoring programs. This new offering is poised to revolutionize the industry by providing a comprehensive solution to the challenges faced in assessing tutoring program delivery and calculating the return on investment.

data.title: Dow Jones index fluctuates ahead of Fed Powell's comments; Gold price surges on Trump news. Tesla earnings expected soon.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed uncertainty as investors awaited the Federal Reserve decisions and comments from Powell. Tesla is set to report its earnings later. Gold prices surged following news related to Trump. The stock market experienced fluctuations as the day progressed, with many eyes on these key events. Stay updated for more developments.

data.title: Decagon's valuation triples to $4.5B with $250M Series D funding from investors like Coatue Management and Index Ventures.
data.description: Decagon, a top company in conversational AI agents specializing in concierge customer experiences, has revealed today its new funding milestone. The latest Series D funding round has secured an impressive $250 million, primarily led by prominent new investors Coatue Management and Index Ventures. Moreover, additional support from new investors such as ChemistryVC, Definition Capital, and Starwood Capital has significantly contributed to this funding success. Existing investors like a16z, A*, Accel, Avra, Bain Capital Ventures, Elad Gil, T.Capital, Forerunner, and Ribbit Capital have also continued their backing. This funding round marks a remarkable triple increase for Decagon.

data.title: CrowdStrike named Customers’ Choice in Gartner's 2026 Endpoint Protection Platforms report based on 97% Willingness to Recommend score from 800 responses.
data.description: CrowdStrike, traded as CRWD on NASDAQ, recently revealed its recognition as the Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Endpoint Protection Platforms report. This acknowledgment comes on the heels of the company achieving the highest number of 5-star ratings among all Customers’ Choice vendors, boasting an impressive 97% Willingness to Recommend score. This achievement is based on a substantial 800 responses received as of November 2025. Noteworthy is the fact that CrowdStrike stands out as the sole vendor consistently named a Customers’ Choice in every edition of the Voice of the Customer for Endpoint Protection Platforms.
Charles Schwab Chief FI strategist Jones: Statement may have some adjustment to inflation.

data.title: In Jan 2026, Parker Foot and Ankle in collaboration with Regenative Labs published a case series on addressing ligamentous defects.
data.description: In a recent press release dated January 28, 2026, Parker Foot and Ankle based in Houston and Pensacola, Florida, under the leadership of foot and ankle expert Robert Parker, DPM, FACFAS, FAENS, revealed a new development in partnership with Regenative Labs. The announcement highlights the release of a peer-reviewed case series that outlines a comprehensive, multimodal approach to foot and ankle care.
